TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Bilus, title = Bilus, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bilus} }

S.FORM: Bilus Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Bilus a niyaro', 19 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 33 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 82% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 27 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 18% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 76%, Amis 3%, roma 3%.
S.PHON: b~b~vi…ĺo~u~us itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŇč ¶…ôn no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u b~b~vi…ĺo~u~us a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ **%, amis *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Bilus Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Bilus a niyaro', 19 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 33 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 82% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 27 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 18% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 76%, Amis 3%, roma 3%.
